parameters.query: SELECT '{{ $json.id }}' AS drive_file_id, EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM transcripts WHERE drive_file_id = '{{ $json.id }}') AS already_ingested;

SELECT
  COALESCE(sub.meeting_id, NULL) AS meeting_id,
  COALESCE(sub.client_id, NULL) AS client_id
FROM (SELECT 1) AS dummy
LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
  SELECT m.id AS meeting_id, m.client_id
  FROM meetings m
  WHERE m.start_at::date = '{{ $json.parsed_date }}'::date
  ORDER BY
    CASE
      WHEN m.title = '{{ ($json.meeting_title || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}' THEN 0
      WHEN m.title ILIKE '%' || '{{ ($json.meeting_title || '').replace(/'/g, "''").split(" - ")[0].split(" <> ")[0].trim() }}' || '%' THEN 1
      WHEN '{{ ($json.meeting_title || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}' ILIKE '%' || m.title || '%' THEN 1
      ELSE 2
    END,
    ABS(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (
      m.start_at - {{ $json.parsed_timestamp ? "'" + $json.parsed_timestamp + "'::timestamptz" : "'" + $json.modified_time + "'::timestamptz" }}
    )))
  LIMIT 1
) sub ON true;

SELECT
  {{ $json.client_id ? "'" + $json.client_id + "'::uuid" : "(SELECT ci.client_id FROM client_identifiers ci WHERE " + ($json.lookup_values.length > 0 ? "ci.identifier_value = ANY(ARRAY[" + $json.lookup_values.map(v => "'" + v.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'").join(',') + "]::text[])" : "false") + " LIMIT 1)" }} AS client_id;

INSERT INTO transcripts (
  meeting_id,
  client_id,
  source_type,
  file_name,
  document_url,
  drive_file_id,
  content_text,
  transcript_at,
  language_code
)
VALUES (
  {{ $json.meeting_id ? "'" + $json.meeting_id + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.client_id  ? "'" + $json.client_id  + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  'google_doc',
  '{{ ($json.file_name || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.document_url || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.drive_file_id }}',
  '{{ ($json.content_text || '').replace(/'/g, "''").substring(0, 500000) }}',
  {{ $json.transcript_at ? "'" + $json.transcript_at + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  'es'
)
ON CONFLICT (source_type, drive_file_id)
DO UPDATE SET
  meeting_id    = COALESCE(transcripts.meeting_id,  EXCLUDED.meeting_id),
  client_id     = COALESCE(transcripts.client_id,   EXCLUDED.client_id),
  content_text  = EXCLUDED.content_text,
  transcript_at = EXCLUDED.transcript_at,
  language_code = EXCLUDED.language_code
RETURNING id AS transcript_id, meeting_id, client_id;
